headline: The Fed’s Hawks and Doves Are Drifting Further Apart. What It Means for Investors.
summary: Futures markets assign a 99.4% chance that the Fed leaves interest rates unchanged at its policy meeting next week.

headline: CME Group (CME) Gets Buy Rating From Erste Group; Argus Research Moves to Hold
summary: CME Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CME) is included among the 14 Stocks on the Verge of Becoming Dividend Aristocrats. On March 5, Hans Engel of Erste Group upgraded CME Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CME) to Buy from Hold. A day earlier, on March 4, Argus Research downgraded CME Group to Hold from Buy. The firm expects “muted growth” in […]

headline: Tickblaze Establishes CME Futures Market Data Distribution Partnership to Support Futures Prop Trading Infrastructure
summary: OTTAWA, Ontario, March 10, 2026--Tickblaze, a trading technology provider serving proprietary trading firms and professional market participants, today announced the establishment of a market data distribution partnership enabling the integration of CME futures market data into the Tickblaze trading platform.
